# Variant Generation Engine

## Inputs

```text
buyer_state
job_to_be_done
pain
mechanism
proof_asset
offer
channel
format
metric
```

## Variant families

```text
pain-first
outcome-first
demo-first
objection-first
competitor-alternative
hidden-cost
risk-reversal
mechanism
proof-stack
```

## Output

```text
variant_id
hypothesis
headline
body
creative_brief
landing_path
measurement_event
```

## Rule

Generate breadth first, then score. Do not prematurely converge on one angle.
